variables.notes: No explicit single SG&A total row exists. Selected the best overhead components above operating profit: sales/marketing, administrative, and R&D. Included R&D here per rule so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD yields SG&A excluding R&D. Excluded subcomponents to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Best dedicated R&D expense line above operating profit.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D expense line appears above operating profit and is the best match. It is also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS so the PROF formula can subtract it out.

variables.notes: No non-controlling interest appears to exist: balance sheet 'Equity attributable to owners of the parent company' equals 'Equity total' in all shown years, and NCI rows are blank. Therefore set to empty per missing data rule.
